era: Dream Pop. E=4 -- ethereal, reverb-drenched, atmospheric, intimate. FIRST DREAM POP. Genre Stage 109. v1.49.353.

location.formative: Seattle atmospheric scene. PNW overcast climate as natural dream pop habitat.

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST DREAM POP -- Genre Stage 109. A new genre enters the 360. Ethereal, reverb-drenched, suspended between consciousness and sleep. Expands emotional palette into suspension.
examples: Beach House: modern dream pop standard.
Cumulus: Seattle dream pop, self-released, Genre Stage 109.
theory_nodes.description: First Dream Pop. Genre Stage 109. Suspension enters the emotional palette.

genealogy.relationship: Cumulus at 212. Dream pop enters the 360.

theory_nodes.concept: Reverb as architecture -- in dream pop, reverb is not an effect but the structure. It creates space, depth, and the 'dreaming' quality. The medium is the message.
examples: Space between notes = important as notes.
Punk uses distortion as energy. Dream pop uses reverb as space.
theory_nodes.description: Reverb as architecture. The structure of dream pop. Space as material.

cross_references.relationship: Previous degree. World/indie (211) to dream pop (212). Cross-genre to single-genre.
Same E=4. Pop precision (210) vs. atmospheric suspension (212). Same energy, different consciousness.
Both atmospheric. Warmth (E=5) vs. suspension (E=4). Related aesthetics, different moods.
